creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 194454
patch to update the port

- update 0.88_1 --> 0.89
- changes: https://metacpan.org/source/INGY/Test-Base-0.89/Changes
- remove BUILD_DEPENDS which are not needed any more
- fix versions of BUILD_DEPENDS
- add TEST_DEPENDS
- add LICENCE_FILE
- adopt mainainership of this port, which has been abandoned by tobez@ since 2013:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/p5-Test-Base/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" just gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180601 runs ok at 11.1-release-amd64, perl 5.26.2
- buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
